evidence.title: README (segment 1)
evidence.excerpt: ![Apple Music-like Lyrics - A lyric page component library for Web](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/ca6a98d4-28ea-4fb6-beec-7948f2ac87ec)

evidence.title: README (segment 2)
evidence.excerpt: A lyric player component library that aims to look similar to iPad version of Apple Music. With [DOM](./packages/core/README.md), [React](./packages/react/README.md) and [Vue](./packages/vue/README.md) bindings.

evidence.title: README (segment 3)
evidence.excerpt: This is perhaps the most iPad Apple Music-like lyric page you've seen in frontend.

evidence.title: README (segment 4)
evidence.excerpt: Although the goal of this project is not to imitate it completely, it will polish some details to be better than the current best lyric players.

evidence.title: README (segment 5)
evidence.excerpt: [AMLL TTML DB - TTML Syllable Lyric Database](https://github.com/amll-dev/amll-ttml-db) / [AMLL TTML Tool - TTML Syllable Lyric Editor](https://github.com/amll-dev/amll-ttml-tool)

evidence.title: README (segment 7)
evidence.excerpt: - [![AMLL-Core](https://img.shields.io/badge/Core-%233178c6?label=Apple%20Music-like%20Lyrics&labelColor=%23FB5C74)](./packages/core/README.md): AMLL Core Component Library, written natively with DOM, provides lyric display component and dynamic fluid background component - [![AMLL-React](https://img.shields.io/badge/React-%23149eca?label=Apple%20Music-like%20Lyrics&labelColor=%23FB5C74)](./packages/react/README.md): AMLL React binding, provides React component forms of lyric display and dynamic fluid background components - [![AMLL-Vue](https://img.shields.io/badge/Vue-%2342d392?label=Apple%20Music-like%20Lyrics&labelColor=%23FB5C74)](./packages/vue/README.md): AMLL Vue binding, provides Vue component forms of lyric display and dynamic fluid background components - [![AMLL-Lyric](https://img.shields.io/badge/Lyric-%23FB8C84?label=Apple%20Music-like%20Lyrics&labelColor=%23FB5C74)](./packages/lyric/README.md): AMLL lyric parsing module, provides parsing and serialization support for various lyric formats including LyRiC, YRC, QRC, and Lyricify Syllable

evidence.title: README (segment 8)
evidence.excerpt: This component framework requires the following browsers or newer versions at a minimum:

evidence.title: main-player-dev
evidence.excerpt: AMLL Player 现已迁移到 <https://github.com/amll-dev/amll-player>。此 release 为占位用，提供 `latest.json` 以供历史版本更新。

evidence.title: full-refractor-player-dev
evidence.excerpt: AMLL Player 现已迁移到 <https://github.com/amll-dev/amll-player>。此 release 为占位用，提供 `latest.json` 以供历史版本更新。
